description:
A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration

Logseq is a joyful, open-source outliner that works on top of local plain-text Markdown and Org-mode files.
Use it to write, organize and share your thoughts, keep your to-do list, and build your own digital garden.
- Includes all changes from Beta 0.10.10 [[May 7th, 2025]] and fixes major regressions with it.
- [[Fixed Issues]]
  - Images and themes not working #11486
  - Global search in blocks not working #11851
    - NOTE: You may need to run the command Rebuild search index for this fix.
  - Drag and drop of pdfs not working #11850
- [[Enhancement]]
  - Upgrade Electron to 36.2.0
Full Changelog: https://github.com/logseq/logseq/compare/0.10.9...0.10.11
